name: Operation Grey Horizon
tagline: A regional power. A neighbour under pressure. A conflict that hasn't started yet.
briefing: You command the strategic apparatus of Valdoria, a mid-sized regional power with ambitions to reabsorb the neighbouring state of Estmark — a former province now aligned with a Western bloc. Direct military action is off the table. The international environment is hostile to overt aggression. Your task: achieve strategic objectives through all instruments of state power before the adversary consolidates its alliances.

player.label: Political-Economic Capture
player.description: Estmark's economy and political standing collapse under sustained pressure.
player.resolution_text: Estmark's economy and political cohesion have collapsed under sustained hybrid pressure. The state can no longer resist Valdoria's terms. Strategic objectives achieved.

player.label: Narrative and Intelligence Blackout
player.description: Estmark's covert and information apparatus are neutralised.
player.resolution_text: Estmark's intelligence services and media apparatus are neutralised. The population is disoriented; the leadership is blind. Without covert capacity or narrative control, Estmark capitulates.

adversary.label: Hybrid Campaign Degraded
adversary.description: Valdoria's covert and information capabilities are neutralised.
adversary.resolution_text: Valdoria's grey zone toolkit has been neutralised. Without covert reach and information dominance, the hybrid pressure campaign collapses. Estmark's sovereignty is preserved.

adversary.label: Aggressor Overextended
adversary.description: The cost of sustained hybrid operations breaks Valdoria's economy.
adversary.resolution_text: The cost of sustained hybrid operations has broken Valdoria's economy. The campaign is no longer sustainable. Estmark survives.

adversary.label: Alliance Consolidation
adversary.description: Estmark survives long enough to secure committed international support.
adversary.resolution_text: Estmark has survived long enough to secure committed international support. Valdoria's window of opportunity has closed. The hybrid campaign fails to achieve its objectives.

name: Iron Curtain Rising
tagline: Your state is the target. Adversary pressure is already building.
briefing: You are the government of Kalthenia, a small democracy facing a coordinated pressure campaign from the authoritarian Drevak Federation. Drevak has already begun information operations and is funding domestic opposition. Your task: resist destabilisation, maintain alliance support, and deter escalation — while avoiding actions that would justify a military response.

player.label: International Isolation
player.description: Drevak's campaign is exposed and condemned — political power collapses.
player.resolution_text: Drevak's coordinated pressure campaign has been exposed and internationally condemned. Sanctions coalesce, alliances fracture. Drevak is isolated and the campaign collapses.

player.label: Campaign Infrastructure Collapse
player.description: Drevak's economic base and propaganda apparatus fail simultaneously.
player.resolution_text: Drevak's economic base and propaganda apparatus have both failed. The destabilisation campaign has no resources to draw on and can no longer sustain operations. Kalthenia survives.

adversary.label: Government in Crisis
adversary.description: Kalthenia's political institutions fracture under hybrid pressure.
adversary.resolution_text: Kalthenia's political institutions have fractured under Drevak's sustained hybrid pressure. The government can no longer maintain coherent resistance. Drevak's destabilisation campaign succeeds.

adversary.label: Societal Fracture
adversary.description: Drevak-backed narratives dominate; information and political will collapse together.
adversary.resolution_text: Drevak-backed narratives dominate the information space. With political will broken and media captured, Kalthenia's resistance collapses. The destabilisation campaign achieves its objectives.

name: The Succession Crisis
tagline: A regime in crisis. A window of five turns. Choose your leverage carefully.
briefing: The Volantian Supreme Director has died after a prolonged illness. The inner circle is fractured between a hardline military faction and a reformist technocrat bloc competing for control. Your intelligence assets in Volantica are well-placed and your covert networks run deep. The window will not last — if the hardliners consolidate power, the threat to your region intensifies dramatically. Move before they close ranks. Exploit the vacuum. Don't let them recover.

player.label: Regime Collapse
player.description: The succession vacuum deepens into full collapse — political legitimacy and economic capacity fail together.
player.resolution_text: The Volantian inner circle has imploded. With political legitimacy exhausted and the economy in freefall, the regime cannot hold. The hardline faction is finished. Mirastan's strategic objectives are achieved before consolidation could begin.

player.label: Intelligence Decapitation
player.description: The hardline faction's covert apparatus and political standing are destroyed simultaneously.
player.resolution_text: Volantica's covert networks are burned. The hardline faction — blind, delegitimised, and unable to operate — loses its grip on the succession. The window Mirastan needed has been pried open permanently.

adversary.label: Consolidation Complete
adversary.description: The hardliners survive long enough to close ranks and restore regime coherence.
adversary.resolution_text: The hardline faction has consolidated power. The succession crisis is over — on their terms. With internal control restored, the Volantian Regime turns its full attention outward. Mirastan's window of opportunity has closed permanently.

adversary.label: Counter-Narrative Victory
adversary.description: Volantica's information operations expose and neutralise Mirastan's influence campaign.
adversary.resolution_text: The Volantian regime's counter-propaganda apparatus has dismantled Mirastan's information operations. The influence campaign is exposed, international sympathy evaporates, and Mirastan is left isolated and discredited.

adversary.label: Opposition Crushed
adversary.description: Mirastan's covert networks are rolled up and political will shattered.
adversary.resolution_text: Volantian security services have systematically dismantled Mirastan's covert networks. With assets burned and political credibility in ruins, the opportunistic campaign collapses. The hardline faction thanks them for the distraction.

name: Digital Cold War
tagline: No bullets. No borders crossed. The war is in the signal.
briefing: Nexora and the Syndikron operate in permanent grey-zone tension. Neither state has appetite for conventional war — the consequences are symmetrically catastrophic. Instead, both sides fight continuously through cyber operations, influence networks, and covert infrastructure. Nexora's national elections are six months away. Syndikron is betting it can fracture domestic consensus, contaminate the information environment, and install a sympathetic government before the vote. Your task: secure the information space, burn their networks, and hold your society together.

player.label: Network Supremacy
player.description: Syndikron's information apparatus and covert infrastructure are dismantled.
player.resolution_text: Syndikron's cyber and influence networks are dark. Their infrastructure is burnt, their operators exposed, their ability to penetrate Nexora's information space permanently degraded. The elections proceed on Nexora's terms.

player.label: Societal Anchor
player.description: Syndikron's political standing collapses internationally while their narrative capacity is destroyed.
player.resolution_text: Syndikron's interference has been exposed on the world stage. International condemnation mounts as their propaganda apparatus collapses. Nexora's institutions hold, the election is secure, and the adversary is isolated.

adversary.label: Digital Occupation
adversary.description: Nexora's information environment is fully compromised — the signal belongs to Syndikron.
adversary.resolution_text: Nexora's information space is occupied. Every channel carries Syndikron's narrative. Citizens cannot distinguish authentic communication from manufactured reality. The elections — if they occur at all — will not be Nexora's.

adversary.label: Election Interference
adversary.description: Nexora's political will and information resilience collapse simultaneously before the vote.
adversary.resolution_text: Syndikron's influence operation has worked. Nexora's political consensus has fractured and the information environment is poisoned. The elections produce a crisis of legitimacy. Syndikron wins without firing a shot.

adversary.label: Persistence Doctrine
adversary.description: Syndikron weathers all countermeasures and remains intact past the election window.
adversary.resolution_text: Syndikron's doctrine of persistent subthreshold pressure has prevailed. Without a decisive takedown, Nexora's countermeasures ran out of time. The election cycle closes with Syndikron's networks intact and ready for the next opportunity.

name: Shadow Protocol
tagline: Great power. Proxy war. Global stakes.
briefing: You direct the strategic operations of Hegemonia, a great power managing a multi-layered proxy conflict against rival Austeria. Both states are nuclear-armed; direct military confrontation is forbidden. The battlespace is economic, informational, and covert. You must achieve decisive strategic advantage before the domestic political window closes.

player.label: Dual-Domain Supremacy
player.description: Austeria's economic and information power collapse simultaneously.
player.resolution_text: Hegemonia has achieved decisive economic and information advantage. Austeria can no longer compete across the primary battlespaces. The proxy conflict resolves in Hegemonia's favour.

adversary.label: Domestic Window Closes
adversary.description: Hegemonia's political coalition collapses; the mission is aborted.
adversary.resolution_text: Hegemonia's political coalition has collapsed. The domestic window for strategic action has closed without achieving decisive advantage. Austeria's strategy of endurance succeeds.

adversary.label: Economic Exhaustion
adversary.description: The cost of multi-domain competition bankrupts Hegemonia.
adversary.resolution_text: Hegemonia's multi-domain campaign has exhausted the state's economic resources. The rival great power cannot sustain the competition. Austeria outlasts the adversary.

adversary.label: Endurance Victory
adversary.description: Austeria outlasts Hegemonia's strategic timeline — still standing at turn 15.
adversary.resolution_text: Austeria has outlasted Hegemonia's strategic timeline. The domestic political window has closed without Hegemonia achieving decisive advantage. The mirror strategy succeeds — by enduring, Austeria wins.

name: Resource Horizon
tagline: Your economy is your weapon. Their army is on your doorstep.
briefing: Kargovan drilling platforms have appeared in the disputed Helentian Shelf — 120 kilometres from Aralios' coast, well inside the contested zone. The Kargovan Directorate's military posture is overtly escalatory; forward deployments suggest they are prepared to enforce extraction by force. They are betting that Aralios lacks the military capacity to resist and that the international community won't intervene in time. Your advantages are economic weight, diplomatic legitimacy, and international exposure. Make this adventure too costly to complete. The clock is running.

player.label: Economic Asphyxiation
player.description: Coordinated sanctions and covert disruption drain Kargova's war machine dry.
player.resolution_text: The economic cost of Kargova's adventure has become unsurvivable. Sanctions have frozen the war chest and covert operations have degraded military readiness below operational threshold. The Directorate withdraws from the Helentian Shelf.

player.label: International Pariah
player.description: Global condemnation reaches critical mass — Kargova's political standing collapses and the campaign becomes untenable.
player.resolution_text: Kargova's seizure of the Helentian Shelf has been universally condemned. Diplomatic isolation, sanctions coalitions, and international legal proceedings have made continued operations politically untenable. The Directorate withdraws, facing a generation of pariah status.

adversary.label: Military Fait Accompli
adversary.description: Aralios' military capacity and economic base are both destroyed — resistance is impossible.
adversary.resolution_text: Aralios' ability to resist has been dismantled. Military assets are degraded beyond utility and the economy can no longer fund countermeasures. The Helentian Shelf is Kargova's — extraction proceeds under military protection.

adversary.label: Economic Strangulation
adversary.description: Kargova's economic pressure and covert operations collapse Aralios' financial foundations.
adversary.resolution_text: Aralios' economic strength — the foundation of its resistance strategy — has been systematically dismantled. Without the financial base to sustain international pressure or fund countermeasures, Aralios capitulates. Kargova secures the resource zone.

adversary.label: Deadline Passed
adversary.description: Kargova completes extraction infrastructure before international pressure can cohere.
adversary.resolution_text: The Kargovan Directorate has bought enough time. Extraction infrastructure in the Helentian Shelf is now operational. The international response arrived too late — the fait accompli is complete, and reversing it would require military action no one is willing to take.
